mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, session_id, rec_type, content, priority, reason, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM diagnosis_recommendation WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diagnosis_recommendation ( tenant_id, session_id, rec_type, content, priority, reason ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{sessionId}, #{recType}, #{content}, #{priority}, #{reason} )
